text: Changed ready_issues() SQL: replaced hardcoded 'issue_type IN (task, test, chore)' with '(issue_type \!= bug OR id NOT IN (SELECT fixes FROM issues WHERE fixes IS NOT NULL AND status \!= closed))'. This includes unplanned bugs in pn ready while excluding bugs that have open/in-progress fix tasks. Updated unit test ready_excludes_bugs → ready_includes_unplanned_bugs with planned-bug exclusion check. Added 3 integration tests: ready_includes_unplanned_bugs, ready_excludes_planned_bugs, ready_type_filter_excludes_bugs.

Changed close_issue() to query remaining open fix tasks before auto-closing the bug. Uses COUNT(*) WHERE fixes=bug_id AND status\!='closed' AND id\!=closing_task. Auto-close reason changed from 'fixed by <task-id>' to just 'fixed' since multiple tasks may contribute. Also fixed pre-existing clippy collapsible_if warning (logged as pn-e1ce7901). Added fixes_multi_fix_all_or_nothing integration test.

Tests were already updated in prior commits: 37bc805 (ready behavior) and fea0416 (multi-fix auto-close). fixes_auto_close already asserts close_reason='fixed'. ready_excludes_bugs was replaced by ready_includes_unplanned_bugs, ready_excludes_planned_bugs, and ready_type_filter_excludes_bugs. All tests pass.
Changed TEMPLATE_FILES path from .sgf/BACKPRESSURE.md to BACKPRESSURE.md and updated MEMENTO_CONTENT to reference @BACKPRESSURE.md. Updated test assertion. All init tests pass.
Changed test.md template reference from .sgf/BACKPRESSURE.md to BACKPRESSURE.md.

All three tests (ready_includes_unplanned_bugs, ready_excludes_planned_bugs, ready_type_filter_excludes_bugs) already exist in crates/pensa/tests/integration.rs (lines 423-501) and pass successfully. No work needed.
Test fixes_multi_fix_all_or_nothing already exists in crates/pensa/tests/integration.rs (lines 211-263) and passes. No work needed.

Updated both the embedded template (crates/springfield/templates/build.md) and the local copy (.sgf/prompts/build.md) to match the spec. Changes: (1) 'task' → 'issue' terminology, (2) simplified exit condition, (3) added bug planning section with 5-step workflow, (4) updated closing instructions to differentiate tasks vs bugs.

All test updates were already handled in commit 37810bb (pn-8c70c206): memento_content assertion, TEMPLATE_FILES path, and MEMENTO_CONTENT constant were all updated from .sgf/BACKPRESSURE.md to BACKPRESSURE.md. creates_all_template_files implicitly validates root path via TEMPLATE_FILES iteration. All 24 init tests pass.

Added 3 tests: backpressure_at_root (verifies BACKPRESSURE.md at root), backpressure_not_in_sgf (verifies no .sgf/BACKPRESSURE.md), memento_references_root_backpressure (verifies MEMENTO.md references root path and not .sgf/ path). All 27 init tests pass.

Moved .sgf/BACKPRESSURE.md to project root BACKPRESSURE.md. Updated .sgf/MEMENTO.md reference from @.sgf/BACKPRESSURE.md to @BACKPRESSURE.md. All 84/85 tests pass; 1 pre-existing failure (daemon_not_reachable_without_pn) logged as pn-2dc1c1ea.

Added init_end_to_end_root_backpressure integration test covering all 5 verification points. Also fixed 4 existing integration tests (init_creates_all_files, init_file_contents, templates_reference_uppercase_filenames, end_to_end_build_loop_with_memento_injection) that were broken by the BACKPRESSURE.md root-path migration. Key changes: file existence checks, MEMENTO @ prefix assertions, and template reference assertions.
No changes needed — dependency tasks (pn-d1570280, pn-850f325c) already updated both the templates and the local project copies (.sgf/prompts/build.md, .sgf/PENSA.md). Files are in sync.

Added integration test init_force_restores_templates_matching_spec that: (1) runs sgf init, (2) modifies PENSA.md, build.md, BACKPRESSURE.md with stale content, (3) runs sgf init --force, (4) verifies templates restored with spec-aligned content (issue terminology, 'Exclusive Work Item (Issue) Tracker' heading, root BACKPRESSURE.md). Also logged pre-existing bug pn-9f771f33 for daemon_not_reachable_without_pn test failure.

README.md did not reference .sgf/BACKPRESSURE.md, but the scaffolding description omitted BACKPRESSURE.md entirely. Updated to include it in the list of scaffolded files and added a note about why it lives at the root (discoverability by both Springfield prompt assembly and claude-wrapper --append-system-prompt-file).

Implemented --spec and --system-file CLI flags. --spec resolves to ./specs/<stem>.md (env: SGF_SPEC). --system-file is repeatable. Both validate file existence early (exit 1 if missing). System file args are injected as --append-system-prompt-file before the prompt in both run_interactive and run_afk docker commands. Skipped when --command is set (testing mode). 7 new integration tests covering: missing/existing spec, missing/existing system-file, multiple system-files, SGF_SPEC env var, and flag-overrides-env precedence.
